S.FORM: == 'Icep == Pakaynien i tilid no mitiliday to kaci'icepan no Taywan i, i tira i 17 nu suki, mihawikidan no Holanta tayni Taywan malo sapaloma', tahamatini saan a ci'icep ku Taywan. Miingiday ho tu fa^detay pala, mirangiay tu caciyaw nu Formosa; tata'angaytu, mimingaytu a kanatal , sahtu u mi'icepay ku tamdaw nu Yincumin . Pi'icep nu Matu'asay I tiya ho u matu'asay nu ((|Yingcumin|Yingcumin)), anu talaumah tu, kanca mi'adup tu, pa^deng saan mitafu tu 'icep, fila' atu 'apul a pacacidek; caay ka 'anuf a mitatuy. Nawhani, adihay i umaumahan atu lutulutukan ku 'icep atu fila' . Dengan u talariyaray mifuting ta misaadihay ku pitafu. Anu mi'icep, caka^ca pipa'apul , pafila', alatek u 'akaway , u falu ku sapakapi. Mapili'ay a tamdaw, manga'ay ka ^ca pipa'apul. Nikawrira, cangu'ut sa ko pipa'apul, cupelak, adihay ku pipa'apul, maduka' ku nguyus. Unian ku mihaenan, adihay han ku fila', kaedah, adihay han ku 'akaway, ^ca ka kahngang ku pi'icep. U kaemangay, maulah mikemkem, nika caay pa'apul cangra. Pi'icep nu luma a finacadan I tini i Nangyo , i Intonisiya , Fuyliping , Malaysiya atu kasa'icu'icul nu kanatal, i tiraay a tamdaw i, maulah tu ma'ikesay a 'icep, ngiwngiw han nangra ku pa'enu nu 'icep, ta pa'atem han nangra ku tamaku a miladek, mahaenay ku nuitiraay a kaulahan. Misa'icep Cecay mihecaan kinatusa a ci fucacing ku 'icep, maedeng 6 fulad maruhemtu. Anu maruhem ku 'icep, atekak a kemkemen, tada kalimelaan a falahen. I tiyatu haw i, pecih han milatusa, milatulu a miladek, kanca ^min han milangas, pitpit han a mitangtang a mi'icang; manga'ay a matenes ku pina'ang, ta rara hantu a mi'icep. Nikawrira, u fa^luhayay mipalumaan a 'icep i, ^minen a mipinglas; caay ka fangcal a 'usawen malu sapaluma, i tiya i, sakatusatu a kaciheci, 'usaw han tahira karuheman malafuhid tu, ta manga'ay malu sapaluma. Ruma satu, anu papitefad han ku heci nu 'icep i, lumengaw i sasra a masasapal, cilacila fahal tata'ang tu a masalidung. Bunka Masamihcahcaan ku 'icep a lumahad, satakaraway i, ma^deng tulu katatingluh nu luma', i tiya tu haw i, ki^mi^mingtu ku heci ningra, tatiih tu a kuyakuyen a mikalic, uya ku letek han tu a mifalah? Caayay! Adihay ku mamasanga'. Sapisaluma', i ti:ya ho, u eli' ku fadahong nu luma', malu 'anungnung nu luma'. Ira ku mafadalay nu rihi, u sapipahecek a mituka'. Pafafuyan, pa'ayaman, u talu'an i umah, i lutuk. Anu ^ca tu ka senger nu 'urad, matenes ku tapangan nu 'icep malu 'anungnung atu hecek. Caayay ku hatiniay aca ku epuc nu 'icep hananay, anu ira ku sa'upu nu salawinawina i, pataluma'ay tu, cipadesay tu, miingkayay tu, masamaamaanay kasa'upuan nu tireng a ngasaw i, mapali'ayaw itu a maladek ku 'icep mipatala. Pahinghing caay pilawa tu 'icep a patayra i luma' nu aalaen a kadafu, awaawa mihawikid tu masalalekuay a ccay ngangarapan. Tu laday i, matu:mes tu ku 'icep atu fila', mateli i tataruan nu payluma' nu Yincumin; malu sapatala tu lafang. Matiniay ku pinangan nu pangcah a tamdaw. Tayra i palapalaan misanga' tu palu'malu tipid, pisadakan mipateli tu dateng, patenas han tu ra'ilen , wa:ta ku kaeso' nu kaen. Ira ku malalukay a tamdaw, pudac han ira ku katul nu palu' malu patafua. U ruma satu, anu takaraw tu ku tapangan nu 'icep, leteken miala ku dungec, sakuhawen, kesiren kanca simanta' han malu sala, awa ku pitulasan a kumaen. Anu i salawacan nu luma' mipaluma tu 'icep; mangalef safalucu'en a misamuecel, fangcal a manengneng, macakat ku lihoc nu niyaru'; rumakat sa i lalan, matiya ira:ay tu ku pa'adingay a mituur i ka'ayaw atu kaikur isu. Nikawrira, anu i 'apilipilisan nu lutuk paluma i, i 'ayawen ku pifariw, mipitaw a misulinga' misafangcal ta paluma han ku sapaluma a fuhid, mitala ho tu pinapina a fulad tu kaci cu'ungan nira, tuna pitala ita i, tatama anu sa tu faliyus atu kafudu'an a palapatan i, unian ku kacalemceman a demak. Nawhani, anu tata'ang tu ku 'icep, nikawrira miming ku lamit, awa ku 'icel a mikulamet tu sra, saka irasa ku fudu', tangsul mari'ri' ku kaitiraan nu pa'icepan. Adihay ku tatinakuen tu maselenay a niyaru' i Taywan. Sarakat, awaay ho kupa'acaay tu 'icep i, macimacian nu Taywan, matini satu, ^ca kasa'awas ira ku ccay pa'acaay tu 'icep a mapatireng, satisil saan i lalan nu maci. Nengneng han mita'elif, safalatfatsa ku Niong a matedi, u pa'acaay i, sahtu u misaidahidahiay a kayin, milimek i kaikur nu dadingu, matiya u ningkiw maru' i laluma', sasamisimisi saan ku heci a ma'araw tu nikacangu'ut nu sapitahpu tu tatirengan; u parakatay tu paliding atu otopay kafahalan "ki:k" saca masastul tu tatihiay a paliding tu pinengnengan aca tura kaying. Naitiniay nu'amisan tahira nutimulan nu Taywan, adihay ku pa'acaay tu matafuay tu a 'icep i lawac nu lalan, kala serangawan han tu nu Taywan ku pipa'pa' tu 'icep. Kaacekan a nengnengen ku naikuran nu tupli' atu padi' , malaklak i kasa'upuan samatiya saan u dadipis ; anu u tupli'itu caayay ku fangcalay a manengneng, salaw ira ku lawla nu Amilika a tamdaw, "Muta' tu lemes ku wenciyang nu Taywan, parakat ho tu paliding" saan. Lisin I tini nutu'asan nu Pangcah ira ku lisin tu pakayniay i 'icep Sa'ayaway kacifucacing a heci i, cakanga'ay malu sapaluma; lalangen ku kapah atu kaying a mi'icep, ^dengan u kinatuluay tu a mahufuc a fafahiyan ta manga'ay mi'icep. Cayay ku nu tireng palumaan a 'icep, aka patedu a mipipitpit; anu matrakay i sasra, aka pipudpud; anu ^ca ma'ekak kisu. Ci mapatayay tu ramud a tamdaw, anu caho ka ta'elif tu tulu fulad i, aka pisaeli tu 'icep nangra; miduduaw kisu a mapatay ku fafahi kanca u fa'inay. Anu pafelian tu, aka pilayap. Nikawrira, caay kalecad ku kasa niyaruaru'. Tafihafan 'icep 檳榔 O 'icep, awaay ko ca'ang no tapangan nira, safaw tosa tangasa safaw lima ko takaraw, i teloc no tapangan enem, siwa aca ko papah, matiya o 'opih no 'ayam macinasay, o heci nira i, kohepic ko podac, talafohid sa ko heci, laloma no heci ira ko paeno, makorahay ko cengel nira. kakaenen食用 O kacihecian no 'icep itini i lima folad tangasa i roma mihecaan sepat folad, siwa ato moetep folad ko pitpitan. Manga'ay mipa'pa' to heci, caay kanga'ay maenoc, o caay ho karohem ko mikemkeman, oya mipitpitan a 'icep, caho ka'ikes ko paeno nira, cisalang pa'pa'en. Ano mipa'pa' to 'icep, sipasip han ko apol i fila, ta tafo han to 'icep a mikamkem, manga'ay caka pacomolen to fila' ato apol, o roma a Kanatal, o maharekay to matangtang ma'icangay to mi'pa'paan nangra a 'icep. Ano mipaloma to 'icep , itini i faedetay a Kanatal, ta lomengaw ko 'icep, sepat so'ot tangasa siwa so'ot a kongce ko takaraw ko palomaan pala, ta koengel cisalang ko heci no 'icep a akaenen, fangcal ko 'aca nira. Oya caay ho kafitelak a hana no 'icep, manga'ay sakohawen, ciyanen a safelen, o kaolahan no 'Amis (Pangcah) a sinafel. Hasapimaan功效 O 'icep, manga'ay malasapaiyo, manga'ay mifotos to isi, midawa to sipir ato miremac to caayay kahalikaen a tamdaw sa ko sowal no ising. Ira haca ko sowal i cudad no ising, misanga'ay to fitoka, piyas, sipir. Likakawa no rayray文化習俗 O 'icep, i Yencomin ko tadamaanay a serangawan, ano piilisinana no riyaro'i, o sinafel ko sapacakat, nikaorira, o 'icep ko satatorongay a sapacak, maskero ko fa'inayan i pilalikidan, mi'araway i liyokay a fafahiyan, ira ko kaolahan nira fa'inayan i, pateli han noya fafahiyan ko 'icep i alifo noya kaolahan nira fa'inayan. ano pataloma' ko mamararamoday i, o sapahinghing no ciloma'ay, iar ira aca ko 'icep sapalafang, i tini mahapingan ko serangawan no 'Amis (Pangcah), i ikor ko polong no ngasaw, sa'aloman sako teloc sonasona, matiya o papah no kilang macelak. I 'orip no Pangcah, o 'icep ko tadamaanay, itini i 'orip no 'Amis (Pangcah) a tamdaw, i pilisinan to, pahanhan to, mahaholoholol to fiyafiyaw, mipalafang, caykanca o 'icep ko tadamaanay, adihay ko sapimanmaan nira, o tapangan no 'icep manga'ay misaloma', oya palo' nira manga'ay malakaysing ato sala, o sasalamaen no wawa, o cifar ko pitenesan to sinafel, o caki, o sapikpik,'saka o 'icep tiini i 'orip no Pangcah, o tadakalimelaan o rayray no mita. Mi'icep paadadayay to 'ekang sanay 嚼檳榔致癌的爭議 O sowal no Wi­fopo Cienkangci , pasowal sa o 'icep mikari'angay to tatirengan, Secieweysencoce( , ira ko patirengan a Pikinkiwan to ^Ekang no Kalokitakti(IARC;國際癌症研究總署),itinii 1987 a mihecaan, mahapingan to mikinkiway a makinkinw to, o mi'icepay a tamdaw, ano mi'icep to cilamlamay to tamako"anoca patokeled sa mitamako a mi'icep"makari'ang no ^ekang ko tatirengan, itini i ngoyos i takolaw ato i elol a ci^ekang. Itini i Taiwan a kanatal, 'aloman ko mi'icepay to 'icep, nawhani, ano mi'icepay a tamdaw, caay kafangcay ko tiring, matiya adada ko fowa', mikari'ang to wadis, caay kafangcal ko rakat no remes, maso^so, mikari'ang to takolaw ato kahemaw ko tiring no dipot a wawa. O no to'as a kimad to icep' 檳榔的傳說故事 kaemangan ho ci Panay maolah a romadiw, nika mafokil masakero cingra. Yo cecay a romi'ad, tayra i pa'icepan cingra, tangasa i 'ice'icepan aro sa romadiw ci Panay, manengneng nira ko papah no 'icep, siwsiw sa ko fali, samingaming sa pasifafaed, pasilaeno, pasikawanan, pasikawili, mato o kaying sa masakero kowaming saan a masakero. Salipak sa ko faloco' ni Panay minengneng to nika iyof no fali ko papah no 'icep, o radiw nira satata'ak satata'ak sato, kafahalan sa milecad matiyaya to o papah no 'icep ko kamay nira a miwakawak, talakawanan, talakawili, pasifafaed, pasilaeno ko piwakawak, roma i mifetir to wa'ay, cahocaho miwakawak to kamay, tala'ayaw talaikor ko pi'awas, mitakonol, mica'a ko tatirengan, o radiw ato wakawak satatodong saan, oya lipahak no faloco' maemin to matahtah a masadak.Kamatiya nira, sedak sa ko kakitaan no niyaro' miraod, pakanengneng to nika fangcal ko radiw ko kero ni Panay, hemek sa palata'ang, licay han nira, " Wawaaw, ona radiw ato kero na icowa kiso a minanam? " han nira. Paca'of han ni Panay " Kangodoan kiso faki, o radiw ako nano soni no 'ayam a minanam, o kero ako i o papah no 'icep a minanam kako " han nira. Nano itiya, ira to ko pinangan a kero no Pangcah tangasa anini.

maro~u~uħəmto~u~u. ano~u~u maro~u~uħəm ko~u~u ʡiʦəp, atəkak a kəmkəmən, taɬ~ɮa kaɾiməɾaan a faɾaħən. i tijato~u~u ħaw i, pəʦiħ ħan miɾato~u~usa, miɾato~u~uɾo~u~u a miɾaɬ~ɮək, kanʦa ʔmin ħan miɾaŋas, pitpit ħan a mitaŋtaŋ a miʡiʦaŋ; maŋaʡaj a matənəs ko~u~u pinaʡaŋ, ta rara ħanto~u~u a miʡiʦəp. nikawrira, o~u~u faʔɾo~u~uħajaj mipaɾo~u~umaan a ʡiʦəp i, ʔminən a mipiŋɾas; ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a ʡo~u~usawən maɾo~u~u sapaɾo~u~uma, i tija i, sakato~u~usato~u~u a kaʦiħəʦi, ʡo~u~usaw ħan taħira karo~u~uħəman maɾafo~u~uħiɬ~ɮ to~u~u, ta maŋaʡaj maɾo~u~u sapaɾo~u~uma. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, ano~u~u papitəfaɬ~ɮ ħan ko~u~u ħəʦi no~u~u ʡiʦəp i, ɾo~u~uməŋaw i sasra a masasapaɾ, ʦiɾaʦiɾa faħaɾ tataʡaŋ to~u~u a masaɾiɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ. b~b~vo~u~unka masamiħʦaħʦaan ko~u~u ʡiʦəp a ɾo~u~umaħaɬ~ɮ, satakarawaj i, maʔɬ~ɮəŋ to~u~uɾo~u~u katatiŋɾo~u~uħ no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, i tija to~u~u ħaw i, kiʔmiʔmiŋto~u~u ko~u~u ħəʦi niŋra, tatiiħ to~u~u a ko~u~ujako~u~ujən a mikaɾiʦ, o~u~uja ko~u~u ɾətək ħan to~u~u a mifaɾaħ? ʦaajaj! aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u mamasaŋaʡ. sapisaɾo~u~umaʡ, i ti:ja ħo~u, o~u~u əɾiʡ ko~u~u faɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, maɾo~u~u ʡano~u~uŋno~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. ira ko~u~u mafaɬ~ɮaɾaj no~u~u riħi, o~u~u sapipaħəʦək a mito~u~ukaʡ. pafafo~u~ujan, paʡajaman, o~u~u taɾo~u~uʡan i o~u~umaħ, i ɾo~u~uto~u~uk. ano~u~u ʔʦa to~u~u ka səŋər no~u~u ʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮ, matənəs ko~u~u tapaŋan no~u~u ʡiʦəp maɾo~u~u ʡano~u~uŋno~u~uŋ ato~u~u ħəʦək. ʦaajaj ko~u~u ħatiniaj aʦa ko~u~u əpo~u~uʦ no~u~u ʡiʦəp ħananaj, ano~u~u ira ko~u~u saʡo~u~upo~u~u no~u~u saɾawinawina i, pataɾo~u~umaʡaj to~u~u, ʦipaɬ~ɮəsaj to~u~u, miiŋkajaj to~u~u, masamaamaanaj kasaʡo~u~upo~u~uan no~u~u tirəŋ a ŋasaw i, mapaɾiʡajaw ito~u~u a maɾaɬ~ɮək ko~u~u ʡiʦəp mipataɾa. paħiŋħiŋ ʦaaj piɾawa to~u~u ʡiʦəp a patajra i ɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u aaɾaən a kaɬ~ɮafo~u~u, awaawa miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u~u masaɾaɾəko~u~uaj a ʦʦaj ŋaŋarapan. to~u~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj i, mato~u~u:məs to~u~u ko~u~u ʡiʦəp ato~u~u fiɾaʡ, matəɾi i tataro~u~uan no~u~u pajɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u jinʦo~u~umin; maɾo~u~u sapataɾa to~u~u ɾafaŋ. matiniaj ko~u~u pinaŋan no~u~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw. tajra i paɾapaɾaan misaŋaʡ to~u~u paɾo~u~uʡmaɾo~u~u tipiɬ~ɮ, pisaɬ~ɮakan mipatəɾi to~u~u ɬ~ɮatəŋ, patənas ħan to~u~u raʡiɾən , wa:ta ko~u~u kaəso~uʡ no~u~u kaən. ira ko~u~u maɾaɾo~u~ukaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, po~u~uɬ~ɮaʦ ħan ira ko~u~u kato~u~uɾ no~u~u paɾo~u~uʡ maɾo~u~u patafo~u~ua. o~u~u ro~u~uma sato~u~u, ano~u~u takaraw to~u~u ko~u~u tapaŋan no~u~u ʡiʦəp, ɾətəkən miaɾa ko~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋəʦ, sako~u~uħawən, kəsirən kanʦa simantaʡ ħan maɾo~u~u saɾa, awa ko~u~u pito~u~uɾasan a ko~u~umaən. ano~u~u i saɾawaʦan no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ mipaɾo~u~uma to~u~u ʡiʦəp; maŋaɾəf safaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡən a misamo~u~uəʦəɾ, faŋʦaɾ a manəŋnəŋ, maʦakat ko~u~u ɾiħo~uʦ no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ; ro~u~umakat sa i ɾaɾan, matija ira:aj to~u~u ko~u~u paʡaɬ~ɮiŋaj a mito~u~uo~u~ur i kaʡajaw ato~u~u kaiko~u~ur iso~u~u. nikawrira, ano~u~u i ʡapiɾipiɾisan no~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk paɾo~u~uma i, i ʡajawən ko~u~u pifariw, mipitaw a miso~u~uɾiŋaʡ misafaŋʦaɾ ta paɾo~u~uma ħan ko~u~u sapaɾo~u~uma a fo~u~uħiɬ~ɮ, mitaɾa ħo~u to~u~u pinapina a fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u~u kaʦi ʦo~u~uʡo~u~uŋan nira, to~u~una pitaɾa ita i, tatama ano~u~u sa to~u~u faɾijo~u~us ato~u~u kafo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʡan a paɾapatan i, o~u~unian ko~u~u kaʦaɾəmʦəman a ɬ~ɮəmak. nawħani, ano~u~u tataʡaŋ to~u~u ko~u~u ʡiʦəp, nikawrira mimiŋ ko~u~u ɾamit, awa ko~u~u ʡiʦəɾ a miko~u~uɾamət to~u~u sra, saka irasa ko~u~u fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʡ, taŋso~u~uɾ mariʡriʡ ko~u~u kaitiraan no~u~u paʡiʦəpan. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u tatinako~u~uən to~u~u masəɾənaj a nijaro~u~uʡ i tajwan. sarakat, awaaj ħo~u ko~u~upaʡaʦaaj to~u~u ʡiʦəp i, maʦimaʦian no~u~u tajwan, matini sato~u~u, ʔʦa kasaʡawas ira ko~u~u ʦʦaj paʡaʦaaj to~u~u ʡiʦəp a mapatirəŋ, satisiɾ saan i ɾaɾan no~u~u maʦi. nəŋnəŋ ħan mitaʡəɾif, safaɾatfatsa ko~u~u nio~uŋ a matəɬ~ɮi, o~u~u paʡaʦaaj i, saħto~u~u o~u~u misaiɬ~ɮaħiɬ~ɮaħiaj a kajin, miɾimək i kaiko~u~ur no~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiŋo~u~u, matija o~u~u niŋkiw maro~u~uʡ i ɾaɾo~u~umaʡ, sasamisimisi saan ko~u~u ħəʦi a maʡaraw to~u~u nikaʦaŋo~u~uʡo~u~ut no~u~u sapitaħpo~u~u to~u~u tatirəŋan; o~u~u parakataj to~u~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ato~u~u o~uto~upaj kafaħaɾan "ki:k" saʦa masasto~u~uɾ to~u~u tatiħiaj a paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ to~u~u pinəŋnəŋan aʦa to~u~ura kajiŋ. naitiniaj no~u~uʡamisan taħira no~u~utimo~u~uɾan no~u~u tajwan, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u paʡaʦaaj to~u~u matafo~u~uaj to~u~u a ʡiʦəp i ɾawaʦ no~u~u ɾaɾan, kaɾa səraŋawan ħan to~u~u no~u~u tajwan ko~u~u pipaʡpaʡ to~u~u ʡiʦəp. kaaʦəkan a nəŋnəŋən ko~u~u naiko~u~uran no~u~u to~u~upɾiʡ ato~u~u paɬ~ɮiʡ , maɾakɾak i kasaʡo~u~upo~u~uan samatija saan o~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮipis ; ano~u~u o~u~u to~u~upɾiʡito~u~u ʦaajaj ko~u~u faŋʦaɾaj a manəŋnəŋ, saɾaw ira ko~u~u ɾawɾa no~u~u amiɾika a tamɬ~ɮaw, "mo~u~utaʡ to~u~u ɾəməs ko~u~u wənʦijaŋ no~u~u tajwan, parakat ħo~u to~u~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ" saan. ɾisin i tini no~u~uto~u~uʡasan no~u~u paŋʦaħ ira ko~u~u ɾisin to~u~u pakajniaj i ʡiʦəp saʡajawaj kaʦifo~u~uʦaʦiŋ a ħəʦi i, ʦakaŋaʡaj maɾo~u~u sapaɾo~u~uma; ɾaɾaŋən ko~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u kajiŋ a miʡiʦəp, ʔɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~u kinato~u~uɾo~u~uaj to~u~u a maħo~u~ufo~u~uʦ a fafaħijan ta maŋaʡaj miʡiʦəp. ʦajaj ko~u~u no~u~u tirəŋ paɾo~u~umaan a ʡiʦəp, aka patəɬ~ɮo~u~u a mipipitpit; ano~u~u matrakaj i sasra, aka pipo~u~uɬ~ɮpo~u~uɬ~ɮ; ano~u~u ʔʦa maʡəkak kiso~u~u. ʦi mapatajaj to~u~u ramo~u~uɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u~u ʦaħo~u ka taʡəɾif to~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, aka pisaəɾi to~u~u ʡiʦəp naŋra; miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uaw kiso~u~u a mapataj ko~u~u fafaħi kanʦa o~u~u faʡinaj. ano~u~u pafəɾian to~u~u, aka piɾajap. nikawrira, ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kasa nijaro~u~uaro~u~uʡ. tafiħafan ʡiʦəp ** o~u ʡiʦəp, awaaj ko~u ʦaʡaŋ no~u tapaŋan nira, safaw to~usa taŋasa safaw ɾima ko~u takaraw, i təɾo~uʦ no~u tapaŋan ənəm, siwa aʦa ko~u papaħ, matija o~u ʡo~upiħ no~u ʡajam maʦinasaj, o~u ħəʦi nira i, ko~uħəpiʦ ko~u po~uɬ~ɮaʦ, taɾafo~uħiɬ~ɮ sa ko~u ħəʦi, ɾaɾo~uma no~u ħəʦi ira ko~u paəno~u, mako~uraħaj ko~u ʦəŋəɾ nira. kakaənən** o~u kaʦiħəʦian no~u ʡiʦəp itini i ɾima fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ taŋasa i ro~uma miħəʦaan səpat fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, siwa ato~u mo~uətəp fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u pitpitan. maŋaʡaj mipaʡpaʡ to~u ħəʦi, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj maəno~uʦ, o~u ʦaaj ħo~u karo~uħəm ko~u mikəmkəman, o~uja mipitpitan a ʡiʦəp, ʦaħo~u kaʡikəs ko~u paəno~u nira, ʦisaɾaŋ paʡpaʡən. ano~u mipaʡpaʡ to~u ʡiʦəp, sipasip ħan ko~u apo~uɾ i fiɾa, ta tafo~u ħan to~u ʡiʦəp a mikamkəm, maŋaʡaj ʦaka paʦo~umo~uɾən to~u fiɾaʡ ato~u apo~uɾ, o~u ro~uma a kanataɾ, o~u maħarəkaj to~u mataŋtaŋ maʡiʦaŋaj to~u miʡpaʡpaan naŋra a ʡiʦəp. ano~u mipaɾo~uma to~u ʡiʦəp , itini i faəɬ~ɮətaj a kanataɾ, ta to~u sipir ato~u mirəmaʦ to~u ʦaajaj kaħaɾikaən a tamɬ~ɮaw sa ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u isiŋ. ira ħaʦa ko~u so~uwaɾ i ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u isiŋ, misaŋaʡaj to~u fito~uka, pijas, sipir. ɾikakawa no~u rajraj**** o~u ʡiʦəp, i jənʦo~umin ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a səraŋawan, ano~u piiɾisinana no~u rijaro~uʡi, o~u sinafəɾ ko~u sapaʦakat, nikao~urira, o~u ʡiʦəp ko~u satato~uro~uŋaj a sapaʦak, maskəro~u ko~u faʡinajan i piɾaɾikiɬ~ɮan, miʡarawaj i ɾijo~ukaj a fafaħijan, ira ko~u kao~uɾaħan nira faʡinajan i, patəɾi ħan no~uja fafaħijan ko~u ʡiʦəp i aɾifo~u no~uja kao~uɾaħan nira faʡinajan. ano~u pataɾo~umaʡ ko~u mamararamo~uɬ~ɮaj i, o~u sapaħiŋħiŋ no~u ʦiɾo~umaʡaj, iar ira aʦa ko~u ʡiʦəp sapaɾafaŋ, i tini maħapiŋan ko~u səraŋawan no~u ʡamis (paŋʦaħ), i iko~ur ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ŋasaw, saʡaɾo~uman sako~u təɾo~uʦ so~unaso~una, matija o~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ maʦəɾak. i ʡo~urip no~u paŋʦaħ, o~u ʡiʦəp ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj, itini i ʡo~urip no~u ʡamis (paŋʦaħ) a tamɬ~ɮaw, i piɾisinan to~u, paħanħan to~u, ato~u saɾa, o~u sasaɾamaən no~u wawa, o~u ʦifar ko~u pitənəsan to~u sinafəɾ, o~u ʦaki, o~u sapikpik,ʡsaka o~u ʡiʦəp tiini i ʡo~urip no~u paŋʦaħ, o~u taɬ~ɮakaɾiməɾaan o~u rajraj no~u mita. miʡiʦəp no~u kaɾo~ukitakti(iarʦ;********),itinii **** a miħəʦaan, maħapiŋan to~u mikinkiwaj a makinkinw to~u, o~u miʡiʦəpaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u miʡiʦəp to~u ʦiɾamɾamaj to~u tamako~u"ano~uʦa pato~ukəɾəɬ~ɮ sa mitamako~u a miʡiʦəp"makariʡaŋ no~u ʔəkaŋ ko~u tatirəŋan, itini i ŋo~ujo~us i tako~uɾaw ato~u i əɾo~uɾ a ʦiʔəkaŋ. itini i taiwan a kanataɾ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u miʡiʦəpaj to~u ʡiʦəp, nawħani, ano~u miʡiʦəpaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj kafaŋʦaj ko~u tiriŋ, matija aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~u fo~uwaʡ, mikariʡaŋ to~u waɬ~ɮis, ʦaaj kafaŋʦaɾ ko~u rakat no~u rəməs, maso~uʔso~u, mikariʡaŋ to~u tako~uɾaw ato~u kaħəmaw ko~u tiriŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~ut a wawa. o~u no~u to~uʡas a kimaɬ~ɮ to~u iʦəpʡ ******* kaəmaŋan ħo~u ʦi panaj mao~uɾaħ a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, nika mafo~ukiɾ masakəro~u ʦiŋra. jo~u ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajra i paʡiʦəpan ʦiŋra, taŋasa i ʡiʦəʡiʦəpan aro~u sa ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ʦi panaj, manəŋnəŋ nira ko~u papaħ no~u ʡiʦəp, siwsiw sa ko~u faɾi, samiŋamiŋ sa pasifafaəɬ~ɮ, pasiɾaəno~u, pasikawanan, pasikawiɾi, mato~u o~u kajiŋ sa masakəro~u ko~uwamiŋ saan a masakəro~u. saɾipak sa ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni panaj minəŋnəŋ to~u nika ijo~uf no~u faɾi ko~u papaħ no~u ʡiʦəp, o~u raɬ~ɮiw nira satataʡak satataʡak sato~u, kafaħaɾan sa miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ matijaja to~u o~u papaħ no~u ʡiʦəp ko~u kamaj nira a miwakawak, taɾakawanan, taɾakawiɾi, pasifafaəɬ~ɮ, pasiɾaəno~u ko~u piwakawak, ro~uma i mifətir to~u waʡaj, ʦaħo~uʦaħo~u miwakawak to~u kamaj, taɾaʡajaw taɾaiko~ur ko~u piʡawas, mitako~uno~uɾ, miʦaʡa ko~u tatirəŋan, o~u raɬ~ɮiw ato~u wakawak satato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saan, o~uja ɾipaħak no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ maəmin to~u mataħtaħ a masaɬ~ɮak.kamatija nira, səɬ~ɮak sa ko~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ mirao~uɬ~ɮ, pakanəŋnəŋ to~u nika faŋʦaɾ ko~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u kəro~u ni panaj, ħəmək sa paɾataʡaŋ, ɾiʦaj ħan nira, " wawaaw, o~una raɬ~ɮiw ato~u kəro~u na iʦo~uwa kiso~u a minanam? " ħan nira. paʦaʡo~uf ħan ni panaj " kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uan kiso~u faki, o~u raɬ~ɮiw ako~u nano~u so~uni no~u ʡajam a minanam, o~u kəro~u ako~u i o~u papaħ no~u ʡiʦəp a minanam kako~u " ħan nira. nano~u itija, ira to~u ko~u pinaŋan a kəro~u no~u paŋʦaħ taŋasa anini.
S.FORM: == 'Icep == Pakaynien i tilid no mitiliday to kaci'icepan no Taywan i, i tira i 17 nu suki, mihawikidan no Holanta tayni Taywan malo sapaloma', tahamatini saan a ci'icep ku Taywan. Miingiday ho tu fa^detay pala, mirangiay tu caciyaw nu Formosa; tata'angaytu, mimingaytu a kanatal , sahtu u mi'icepay ku tamdaw nu Yincumin . Pi'icep nu Matu'asay I tiya ho u matu'asay nu ((|Yingcumin|Yingcumin)), anu talaumah tu, kanca mi'adup tu, pa^deng saan mitafu tu 'icep, fila' atu 'apul a pacacidek; caay ka 'anuf a mitatuy. Nawhani, adihay i umaumahan atu lutulutukan ku 'icep atu fila' . Dengan u talariyaray mifuting ta misaadihay ku pitafu. Anu mi'icep, caka^ca pipa'apul , pafila', alatek u 'akaway , u falu ku sapakapi. Mapili'ay a tamdaw, manga'ay ka ^ca pipa'apul. Nikawrira, cangu'ut sa ko pipa'apul, cupelak, adihay ku pipa'apul, maduka' ku nguyus. Unian ku mihaenan, adihay han ku fila', kaedah, adihay han ku 'akaway, ^ca ka kahngang ku pi'icep. U kaemangay, maulah mikemkem, nika caay pa'apul cangra. Pi'icep nu luma a finacadan I tini i Nangyo , i Intonisiya , Fuyliping , Malaysiya atu kasa'icu'icul nu kanatal, i tiraay a tamdaw i, maulah tu ma'ikesay a 'icep, ngiwngiw han nangra ku pa'enu nu 'icep, ta pa'atem han nangra ku tamaku a miladek, mahaenay ku nuitiraay a kaulahan. Misa'icep Cecay mihecaan kinatusa a ci fucacing ku 'icep, maedeng 6 fulad maruhemtu. Anu maruhem ku 'icep, atekak a kemkemen, tada kalimelaan a falahen. I tiyatu haw i, pecih han milatusa, milatulu a miladek, kanca ^min han milangas, pitpit han a mitangtang a mi'icang; manga'ay a matenes ku pina'ang, ta rara hantu a mi'icep. Nikawrira, u fa^luhayay mipalumaan a 'icep i, ^minen a mipinglas; caay ka fangcal a 'usawen malu sapaluma, i tiya i, sakatusatu a kaciheci, 'usaw han tahira karuheman malafuhid tu, ta manga'ay malu sapaluma. Ruma satu, anu papitefad han ku heci nu 'icep i, lumengaw i sasra a masasapal, cilacila fahal tata'ang tu a masalidung. Bunka Masamihcahcaan ku 'icep a lumahad, satakaraway i, ma^deng tulu katatingluh nu luma', i tiya tu haw i, ki^mi^mingtu ku heci ningra, tatiih tu a kuyakuyen a mikalic, uya ku letek han tu a mifalah? Caayay! Adihay ku mamasanga'. Sapisaluma', i ti:ya ho, u eli' ku fadahong nu luma', malu 'anungnung nu luma'. Ira ku mafadalay nu rihi, u sapipahecek a mituka'. Pafafuyan, pa'ayaman, u talu'an i umah, i lutuk. Anu ^ca tu ka senger nu 'urad, matenes ku tapangan nu 'icep malu 'anungnung atu hecek. Caayay ku hatiniay aca ku epuc nu 'icep hananay, anu ira ku sa'upu nu salawinawina i, pataluma'ay tu, cipadesay tu, miingkayay tu, masamaamaanay kasa'upuan nu tireng a ngasaw i, mapali'ayaw itu a maladek ku 'icep mipatala. Pahinghing caay pilawa tu 'icep a patayra i luma' nu aalaen a kadafu, awaawa mihawikid tu masalalekuay a ccay ngangarapan. Tu laday i, matu:mes tu ku 'icep atu fila', mateli i tataruan nu payluma' nu Yincumin; malu sapatala tu lafang. Matiniay ku pinangan nu pangcah a tamdaw. Tayra i palapalaan misanga' tu palu'malu tipid, pisadakan mipateli tu dateng, patenas han tu ra'ilen , wa:ta ku kaeso' nu kaen. Ira ku malalukay a tamdaw, pudac han ira ku katul nu palu' malu patafua. U ruma satu, anu takaraw tu ku tapangan nu 'icep, leteken miala ku dungec, sakuhawen, kesiren kanca simanta' han malu sala, awa ku pitulasan a kumaen. Anu i salawacan nu luma' mipaluma tu 'icep; mangalef safalucu'en a misamuecel, fangcal a manengneng, macakat ku lihoc nu niyaru'; rumakat sa i lalan, matiya ira:ay tu ku pa'adingay a mituur i ka'ayaw atu kaikur isu. Nikawrira, anu i 'apilipilisan nu lutuk paluma i, i 'ayawen ku pifariw, mipitaw a misulinga' misafangcal ta paluma han ku sapaluma a fuhid, mitala ho tu pinapina a fulad tu kaci cu'ungan nira, tuna pitala ita i, tatama anu sa tu faliyus atu kafudu'an a palapatan i, unian ku kacalemceman a demak. Nawhani, anu tata'ang tu ku 'icep, nikawrira miming ku lamit, awa ku 'icel a mikulamet tu sra, saka irasa ku fudu', tangsul mari'ri' ku kaitiraan nu pa'icepan. Adihay ku tatinakuen tu maselenay a niyaru' i Taywan. Sarakat, awaay ho kupa'acaay tu 'icep i, macimacian nu Taywan, matini satu, ^ca kasa'awas ira ku ccay pa'acaay tu 'icep a mapatireng, satisil saan i lalan nu maci. Nengneng han mita'elif, safalatfatsa ku Niong a matedi, u pa'acaay i, sahtu u misaidahidahiay a kayin, milimek i kaikur nu dadingu, matiya u ningkiw maru' i laluma', sasamisimisi saan ku heci a ma'araw tu nikacangu'ut nu sapitahpu tu tatirengan; u parakatay tu paliding atu otopay kafahalan "ki:k" saca masastul tu tatihiay a paliding tu pinengnengan aca tura kaying. Naitiniay nu'amisan tahira nutimulan nu Taywan, adihay ku pa'acaay tu matafuay tu a 'icep i lawac nu lalan, kala serangawan han tu nu Taywan ku pipa'pa' tu 'icep. Kaacekan a nengnengen ku naikuran nu tupli' atu padi' , malaklak i kasa'upuan samatiya saan u dadipis ; anu u tupli'itu caayay ku fangcalay a manengneng, salaw ira ku lawla nu Amilika a tamdaw, "Muta' tu lemes ku wenciyang nu Taywan, parakat ho tu paliding" saan. Lisin I tini nutu'asan nu Pangcah ira ku lisin tu pakayniay i 'icep Sa'ayaway kacifucacing a heci i, cakanga'ay malu sapaluma; lalangen ku kapah atu kaying a mi'icep, ^dengan u kinatuluay tu a mahufuc a fafahiyan ta manga'ay mi'icep. Cayay ku nu tireng palumaan a 'icep, aka patedu a mipipitpit; anu matrakay i sasra, aka pipudpud; anu ^ca ma'ekak kisu. Ci mapatayay tu ramud a tamdaw, anu caho ka ta'elif tu tulu fulad i, aka pisaeli tu 'icep nangra; miduduaw kisu a mapatay ku fafahi kanca u fa'inay. Anu pafelian tu, aka pilayap. Nikawrira, caay kalecad ku kasa niyaruaru'. Tafihafan 'icep 檳榔 O 'icep, awaay ko ca'ang no tapangan nira, safaw tosa tangasa safaw lima ko takaraw, i teloc no tapangan enem, siwa aca ko papah, matiya o 'opih no 'ayam macinasay, o heci nira i, kohepic ko podac, talafohid sa ko heci, laloma no heci ira ko paeno, makorahay ko cengel nira. kakaenen食用 O kacihecian no 'icep itini i lima folad tangasa i roma mihecaan sepat folad, siwa ato moetep folad ko pitpitan. Manga'ay mipa'pa' to heci, caay kanga'ay maenoc, o caay ho karohem ko mikemkeman, oya mipitpitan a 'icep, caho ka'ikes ko paeno nira, cisalang pa'pa'en. Ano mipa'pa' to 'icep, sipasip han ko apol i fila, ta tafo han to 'icep a mikamkem, manga'ay caka pacomolen to fila' ato apol, o roma a Kanatal, o maharekay to matangtang ma'icangay to mi'pa'paan nangra a 'icep. Ano mipaloma to 'icep , itini i faedetay a Kanatal, ta lomengaw ko 'icep, sepat so'ot tangasa siwa so'ot a kongce ko takaraw ko palomaan pala, ta koengel cisalang ko heci no 'icep a akaenen, fangcal ko 'aca nira. Oya caay ho kafitelak a hana no 'icep, manga'ay sakohawen, ciyanen a safelen, o kaolahan no 'Amis (Pangcah) a sinafel. Hasapimaan功效 O 'icep, manga'ay malasapaiyo, manga'ay mifotos to isi, midawa to sipir ato miremac to caayay kahalikaen a tamdaw sa ko sowal no ising. Ira haca ko sowal i cudad no ising, misanga'ay to fitoka, piyas, sipir. Likakawa no rayray文化習俗 O 'icep, i Yencomin ko tadamaanay a serangawan, ano piilisinana no riyaro'i, o sinafel ko sapacakat, nikaorira, o 'icep ko satatorongay a sapacak, maskero ko fa'inayan i pilalikidan, mi'araway i liyokay a fafahiyan, ira ko kaolahan nira fa'inayan i, pateli han noya fafahiyan ko 'icep i alifo noya kaolahan nira fa'inayan. ano pataloma' ko mamararamoday i, o sapahinghing no ciloma'ay, iar ira aca ko 'icep sapalafang, i tini mahapingan ko serangawan no 'Amis (Pangcah), i ikor ko polong no ngasaw, sa'aloman sako teloc sonasona, matiya o papah no kilang macelak. I 'orip no Pangcah, o 'icep ko tadamaanay, itini i 'orip no 'Amis (Pangcah) a tamdaw, i pilisinan to, pahanhan to, mahaholoholol to fiyafiyaw, mipalafang, caykanca o 'icep ko tadamaanay, adihay ko sapimanmaan nira, o tapangan no 'icep manga'ay misaloma', oya palo' nira manga'ay malakaysing ato sala, o sasalamaen no wawa, o cifar ko pitenesan to sinafel, o caki, o sapikpik,'saka o 'icep tiini i 'orip no Pangcah, o tadakalimelaan o rayray no mita. Mi'icep paadadayay to 'ekang sanay 嚼檳榔致癌的爭議 O sowal no Wi­fopo Cienkangci , pasowal sa o 'icep mikari'angay to tatirengan, Secieweysencoce( , ira ko patirengan a Pikinkiwan to ^Ekang no Kalokitakti(IARC;國際癌症研究總署),itinii 1987 a mihecaan, mahapingan to mikinkiway a makinkinw to, o mi'icepay a tamdaw, ano mi'icep to cilamlamay to tamako"anoca patokeled sa mitamako a mi'icep"makari'ang no ^ekang ko tatirengan, itini i ngoyos i takolaw ato i elol a ci^ekang. Itini i Taiwan a kanatal, 'aloman ko mi'icepay to 'icep, nawhani, ano mi'icepay a tamdaw, caay kafangcay ko tiring, matiya adada ko fowa', mikari'ang to wadis, caay kafangcal ko rakat no remes, maso^so, mikari'ang to takolaw ato kahemaw ko tiring no dipot a wawa. O no to'as a kimad to icep' 檳榔的傳說故事 kaemangan ho ci Panay maolah a romadiw, nika mafokil masakero cingra. Yo cecay a romi'ad, tayra i pa'icepan cingra, tangasa i 'ice'icepan aro sa romadiw ci Panay, manengneng nira ko papah no 'icep, siwsiw sa ko fali, samingaming sa pasifafaed, pasilaeno, pasikawanan, pasikawili, mato o kaying sa masakero kowaming saan a masakero. Salipak sa ko faloco' ni Panay minengneng to nika iyof no fali ko papah no 'icep, o radiw nira satata'ak satata'ak sato, kafahalan sa milecad matiyaya to o papah no 'icep ko kamay nira a miwakawak, talakawanan, talakawili, pasifafaed, pasilaeno ko piwakawak, roma i mifetir to wa'ay, cahocaho miwakawak to kamay, tala'ayaw talaikor ko pi'awas, mitakonol, mica'a ko tatirengan, o radiw ato wakawak satatodong saan, oya lipahak no faloco' maemin to matahtah a masadak.Kamatiya nira, sedak sa ko kakitaan no niyaro' miraod, pakanengneng to nika fangcal ko radiw ko kero ni Panay, hemek sa palata'ang, licay han nira, " Wawaaw, ona radiw ato kero na icowa kiso a minanam? " han nira. Paca'of han ni Panay " Kangodoan kiso faki, o radiw ako nano soni no 'ayam a minanam, o kero ako i o papah no 'icep a minanam kako " han nira. Nano itiya, ira to ko pinangan a kero no Pangcah tangasa anini.
